# /conduct — OpenCode

Reads task class from input, resolves lane from `config/lanes.yaml`,
routes to appropriate worker, returns results.

1. Classify the task using `docs/instructions/task-classes.md`
2. Resolve: `python -m core.router.resolve --class <class>`
3. Execute in the resolved lane's worker pool
4. Return findings

See root `AGENTS.md` for full operating contract.
